overview.short: The Basilica of Our Lady of Graces is a Roman Catholic church in Sardhana, 19 km north-west of Meerut, in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.
overview.description: The Basilica of Our Lady of Graces is a Roman Catholic church in Sardhana, 19 km north-west of Meerut, in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Sardhana
topPlaces.description: Sardhana is a city and a municipal board in Meerut district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is 85 km (53 mi) northeast of New Delhi and 13 mi from Meerut.

topPlaces.name: Kaland, India
topPlaces.description: Kaland is a village in Meerut district. It is 6 km (3.7 mi) from Sardhana and 22 km (14 mi) from Meerut, It's nearest village Chhur from 2 km (1.2 mi).

topPlaces.name: Chhur
topPlaces.description: Chhur (Hindi pronunciation: [छूर]) is a large village located about 30 km (19 mi) north of Meerut, in Meerut district, Uttar Pradesh state, India. Chhur is a village with a population of 7,566, as per the 2011 Census.

topPlaces.name: Daurala
topPlaces.description: Daurala is a town and a nagar panchayat in Meerut district in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India.

items.note: Sardhana is a city and a municipal board in Meerut district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is 85 km (53 mi) northeast of New Delhi and 13 mi from Meerut.
Kaland is a village in Meerut district. It is 6 km (3.7 mi) from Sardhana and 22 km (14 mi) from Meerut, It's nearest village Chhur from 2 km (1.2 mi).

Chhur (Hindi pronunciation: [छूर]) is a large village located about 30 km (19 mi) north of Meerut, in Meerut district, Uttar Pradesh state, India. Chhur is a village with a population of 7,566, as per the 2011 Census.
Daurala is a town and a nagar panchayat in Meerut district in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Basilica of Our Lady of Graces?
faq.a: The best time to visit Basilica of Our Lady of Graces is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Basilica of Our Lady of Graces?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Indira Gandhi International Airport, Delhi (82 km) and the nearest railway station is New Delhi Railway Station (68 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Basilica of Our Lady of Graces?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Basilica of Our Lady of Graces at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Basilica of Our Lady of Graces?
faq.a: Stays in Basilica of Our Lady of Graces start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Basilica of Our Lady of Graces?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sardhana, Kaland, India, Chhur, Daurala.
